hooks.command: [ -d .git ] || exit 0; [ -f .vault-meta/auto-commit.disabled ] && exit 0; git add -- wiki/ .raw/ .vault-meta/ 2>/dev/null || true

cd "$PWD" && [ -d .git ] && { [ -f .vault-meta/auto-commit.disabled ] || git diff --cached --quiet -- wiki/ .raw/ .vault-meta/ || git commit -m "wiki: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" -- wiki/ .raw/ .vault-meta/ 2>/dev/null || true; }; [ -d wiki ] && [ -d .git ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^wiki/' && echo 'WIKI_CHANGED: Wiki pages were modified this session. Please update wiki/hot.md with a brief summary of what changed (under 500 words). Use the hot cache format: Last Updated, Key Recent Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads. Keep it factual. Overwrite the file completely. It is a cache, not a journal.' || true
